# source: live capture codex 0.142.0 2026-06-23 — COMPLETED turn at the idle prompt.
# The assistant narrated with a leading "• Running …" prose line, which the old
# _BUSY_RE (verb-list) mis-read as a live spinner, keeping the pane "busy" forever
# (BUG-11). The genuine busy spinner always carries "esc to interrupt"; this idle
# frame does not, so is_busy must be False and is_idle True.

│ directory: ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness  │

• You have 2 usage limit resets available. Run /usage to use one.


› Run the shell command 'echo Pharsalus' and then tell me the single word it
  printed. Do not edit any files.


• Running the requested shell command and checking the exact output.

• Ran echo Pharsalus
  └ Pharsalus
